74183.subject: Ramp just gave accountants Free AI to get at their clients 🤖📊; Anthropic made the EU come asking for Claude Myth…
74183.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse402

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
Everything Anthropic Shipped in 2026: Every Claude Model, Agent, & Tool - And How to Actually Use Them [ https://substack.com/redirect/8d7bc1ce-89c0-4297-8a3b-16883b039383?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/8d7bc1ce-89c0-4297-8a3b-16883b039383?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [29 Claude launches in 5 months. Most users missed half of them. Here’s every model, agent, and tool - with the playbook for each one]
The Complete Guide to Claude Dynamic Workflows [ https://substack.com/redirect/76789f27-d3db-4c90-93f4-5fe2b7cf9984?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/76789f27-d3db-4c90-93f4-5fe2b7cf9984?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [From first principles to production: every workflow pattern, cost trap, and real-world use cases founders, builders, and investors need to master Anthropic’s most powerful Claude Code feature yet]
Claude Opus 4.8: The Complete Prompting Playbook for 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/043e43dc-63c5-454c-894c-6e6dc078f51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🧠 [ https://substack.com/redirect/043e43dc-63c5-454c-894c-6e6dc078f51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [How to get the best results from Anthropic’s most powerful model every single time, including the new Dynamic Workflows feature]
The Claude Finance Playbook: How CFOs Use AI to Build Models, Forecast Cash, and Close Books Faster [ https://substack.com/redirect/cac6a3fe-9d69-4f33-9add-e1357873a161?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📊 [ https://substack.com/redirect/cac6a3fe-9d69-4f33-9add-e1357873a161?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [A practical guide to setting up Claude for real finance work, with battle-tested prompts optimized for Claude Opus 4.7]
Ex-OpenAI’s Aschenbrenner Bet $5.5B on AI Chips. Now He’s Betting $8.5B Against Them [ https://substack.com/redirect/2c9a7c35-542c-4782-9f62-41d7d26d4aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 💸 [ https://substack.com/redirect/2c9a7c35-542c-4782-9f62-41d7d26d4aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Leopold Aschenbrenner’s AI hedge fund Situational Awareness went from pure AI long to 62% short semiconductors in one quarter. Here’s

74182.subject: Nukes off the agenda as Xi Jinping heads to North Korea
74182.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDB9AAcAAAAAAmrmS7azTjzUkpMxb8KT2kgb7NtraFit4iImzwhIQ_JYOHxWAjVETizbdoTFMKJFmWtrfr1-vCgYeXt9Zwm44lxWQxaDv8Mkim29aua6ywHZfQ 

June 7th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDB9AAcAAAAAAmrmS7a03RV1lri5oW2Xj4RPwrCTNz90ZUdPGXQO9oBRP_UM2v2AJ3qeJjJ9GLHmnZUEEYst23JIZSUZYCK0TORaPSOvwi6FS7sCL5MMWVjf_w 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDB9AAcAAAAAAmrmS7a11EcFkPSWgYH-412f7fpYVe1bp2m_QvXaJoqxKrdnDZZIvWpsQc2ltq3Yuqc_xIBIIzIdxYIq75JQkylJeuoaAvLIH0sYG0tUQP2pWA 



 
 

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



 Kim Jong Un, North Korea’s nuclear-armed dictator, is at the apex of a love triangle. He and Vladimir Putin, Russia’s president, have lately become bosom buddies. Now a jealous Xi Jinping, China’s president, is 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDB9AAcAAAAAAmrmS7a2uAI934tuprE4IAbKLhnV-s4BiqeiUeEC-d5QNSdAyeDF2nSOR7P_2jxQ7IV9YH8EKBoPlVsXEMgKRbIE08PSGfNQIuc0bzch 
heading to Pyongyang 
 to court Mr Kim. That makes things awkward for America, and its aspiration to curtail North Korea’s nuclear programme.


 Six-wheeled bots may soon be cruising the pavements of your city. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDB9AAcAAAAAAmrmS7a3-LdON1MPs9sKi8EfhWNYR83QSyey542T4a-TFVTN_7be

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

73054.subject: BAVA Is Live: Avalanche Just Got a Seat at the Institutional Table
73054.body:
View this post on the web at https://www.team1.blog/p/bava-is-live-avalanche-just-got-a

Getting exposure to AVAX used to mean managing wallets, figuring out private keys, and navigating staking mechanics on your own. For most institutional investors and everyday brokerage users, that friction was enough to keep them on the sidelines.
Bitwise Asset Management launched the Bitwise Avalanche ETF (NYSE: BAVA), giving investors direct exposure to AVAX through a standard brokerage account. No wallet setup. No staking complexity. Also, BAVA actively stakes the fund’s AVAX holdings, aiming to pass those staking rewards back to shareholders.
Want to keep up with the latest in the Avalanche ecosystem? Subscribe to the Team1 blog and get our updates in your inbox weekly.
What Is BAVA
BAVA is a spot Avalanche ETF, meaning the fund holds actual AVAX tokens rather than derivatives or futures. Bitwise, which manages $11 billion in client assets, runs the product through its in-house staking division, Bitwise Onchain Solutions.
Here is how the staking structure works: roughly 70% of the fund’s AVAX [ https://substack.com/redirect/6d85e6f4-5177-450f-acfe-d09f7cf0257a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] is staked at any given time, targeting Avalanche’s current average staking reward rate of 5.4% [ https://substack.com/redirect/503f0339-b361-4e87-9cc7-c57861679e02?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. The remaining 30% [ https://substack.com/redirect/6d85e6f4-5177-450f-acfe-d09f7cf0257a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] stays in a liquidity reserve to handle redemptions. Net rewards flow back to shareholders on a regular schedule.
The fund trades on the NYSE under the ticker BAVA. The sponsor fee is 0.34% [ https://substack.com/redirect/53be78a2-ae7e-472c-97bc-a8ece1096053?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], waived entirely for the first month on the fund’s first $500 million in assets. Early trading showed $400,000 in volume within the first 90 minutes, which Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart described as quite good for a launch.
Why Avalanche, Why Now
The timing of BAVA reflects something that has been building quietly in the Avalanche ecosystem, a growing list of real-world assets deployments that go well beyond crypto-native use cases. Currently, Avalanche is emerging as one of the leading platforms for businesses, governments, and real-world use cases by powering institutional projects like:
FIFA [ https://substack.com/redirect/c81eaf17-5d80-488f-9fbe-4f420c61784e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]‘s proprietary blockchain for digital collectibles, including ticket options for the 2026 World Cup
Wyoming’s Frontier (FRNT [ https://substack.com/redirect/0a3bb75b-c123-4bdb-a0cb-fa27587f5381?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]) Stable Token, the first stat

73014.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 04/2026
73014.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice
